active.title: Test Repository Setup
active.task_metadata:
Description: Test the new todo-manager repository structure and ensure both Erdell and lite_bot can access it properly.
Notes: This is a test task to demonstrate the task format and ensure the repository is working correctly. Once confirmed, we can begin migrating from the GitHub Pages todo website to this repository-based system.
Tags: setup, test, repository, integration, proactive_help, overdue, priority, github-actions
